{{- $prodHost := partial "utils/prod-host.html" . -}}
# {{ .Site.Title }}

> {{ .Site.Params.description | default "" }}

This is the root documentation index. For detailed page listings, follow the section links below.

{{ range where site.Sections "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
{{- template "llms-root-index-tree" dict "context" . "level" 2 "prodHost" $prodHost }}
{{ end }}
---
Generated on {{ now.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05 UTC" }}
Site: {{ $prodHost }}

{{- define "llms-root-index-tree" -}}
{{- $s := .context -}}
{{- $level := .level | default 2 -}}
{{- $prodHost := .prodHost -}}
{{- $depth := len (findRE "[^/]+" $s.RelPermalink) -}}
{{- $hashes := strings.Repeat $level "#" -}}

{{- if not $s.Sections }}
{{- /* Leaf section (e.g. blog, tutorials): inline pages */}}
{{ "\n" }}{{ $hashes }} {{ $s.Title }}
{{- range where $s.RegularPages "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ print $prodHost .RelPermalink }}): {{ .Summary | plainify | truncate 100 | strings.TrimSpace }}{{ if .Date }} - Published {{ .Date.Format "2006-01-02" }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}

{{- else if ge $depth 3 }}
{{- /* Version-level section (e.g. docs/<product>/<version>): link to its llms.txt */}}
- [{{ $s.Title }}]({{ print $prodHost $s.RelPermalink }}llms.txt)

{{- else }}
{{- /* Intermediate section (e.g. docs, docs/<product>): add header and recurse */}}
{{ "\n" }}{{ $hashes }} {{ $s.Title }}
{{- range where $s.Sections "Params.llms" "ne" false }}
{{ template "llms-root-index-tree" dict "context" . "level" (add $level 1) "prodHost" $prodHost }}
{{- end }}

{{- end }}
{{- end -}}
